title: Security: Heap-use-after-free in BluetoothChooserController::AddOrUpdateDevice
description_snippet:
**VERSION**   
Chrome Version: 89.0.4327.0 (Official Build) canary (x86_64)  
Operating System: MacOS  
  
**REPRODUCTION CASE**   
1. Go to https://maxlgu.github.io/pr/max-nonbasiccard/  
2. Click on "Busy" button.  
4. In payment dialog try to change http://www.google.com to https://lbstyle.github
